recalls.Description: This recall involves the AiTuiTui Pull String Teething Toy. The teething toy is an off-white disc shape with either a red ball or blue ball in the middle and six long pull string "tentacles" of various colors running through the ball. There are also three free-spinning rings on one side and soft push buttons on the disc. "Model: 688-59" is printed on the product packaging.
recalls.Title: AiTuiTui Pull String Teething Toys Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Choking; Violate Mandatory Standard for Toys; Sold on Amazon by Vanfun

Injuries.Name: CPSC is aware of 15 choking incidents and two incidents of children able to bite pieces off the silicone strings.

Retailers.Name: Online at Amazon.com from August 2022 to September 2025 for about $10.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Mailesi Technology Co., Ltd., dba Vanfun, of China

Hazards.Name: The hair growth serum contains minoxidil, which must be in child-resistant packaging, as required by the Poison Prevention Packaging Act. The serum bottle is not child-resistant, posing a risk of serious injury or death from poisoning if the contents are swallowed by young children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the teething toy immediately and contact Vanfun for full refund remedy. Consumers should cut and discard all string tentacles, write "DESTROYED" on the off-white main body of the toy using a permanent marker, and email a photograph of the destroyed product to recallmls@outlook.com.

recalls.Description: This recall involves the Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy. The teething toy is an off-white disc shape with either a red ball or blue ball in the middle and six long, silicone pull string "tentacles" of various colors running through the ball. There are also three free-spinning rings and soft push buttons on the disc. "Model no. 688-59" is printed on the product packaging.
recalls.Title: Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toys Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Choking; Violate Mandatory Standard for Toys; Sold on Amazon by Longyanguiheng

Images.Caption: Recalled Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy – blue
Recalled Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy – blue
Recalled Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy – red
Recalled Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy – red

Injuries.Name: CPSC is aware of 32 choking incidents.

Retailers.Name: Online at Amazon.com from June 2025 through October 2025 for between $10 and $16.

Importers.Name: Longyan Xinluo District Guiheng E-Commerce Co. Ltd., dba Longyanguiheng, of China

Hazards.Name: The recalled teething toys violate the mandatory standard for toys because the silicone strings are smaller than permitted. The silicone strings can reach the back of the throat and become lodged, posing a risk of respiratory distress, serious choking hazard and death.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the teething toy immediately, take it away from children and contact Longyanguiheng to receive a full refund. Consumers should cut and discard all silicone string tentacles, write "DESTROYED" on the main body of the toy using a permanent marker, and email a photograph of the destroyed product to yetonamr_recall@163.com.

recalls.Description: This recall involves Chews Life Silicone Rosary teethers including models Assisi, Little Flower, God's Grace, Cecilia, John the Baptist and Divine Mercy, and Chews Life Silicone Decades teethers including models Genesis, Maccabees, Ester, Wisdom, Divine Mercy, Psalm and Proverbs. The recalled teethers are made of multi-colored beads with a cross at the end. Each teether has a two-piece safety snap clasp.
recalls.Title: Chews Life Recalls Silicone Rosary and Decade Teethers Due to Choking Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: Chews Life toll-free at 888-742-2276 from 9 a.m. to 7 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, email at sandy@chewslife.com, or online at https://chewslife.com/pages/clasp-recall or www.chewslife.com and click on "Recall Notices" at the bottom of the page for more information.

Images.Caption: Replacement safety snap clasp on repaired teethers

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 92 reports of the safety snap clasp detaching. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Online at chewslife.com from January 2024 through April 2024 for between $20 and $38.

Distributors.Name: Chews Life, of Grand Rapids, Michigan

Hazards.Name: Part of the teethers' safety snap clasp can detach, posing a choking hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled teethers and contact Chews Life to receive a free repair. Consumers will be provided with a prepaid shipping label to return the recalled teethers to Chews Life. Chews Life will mail consumers the repaired teethers at no charge.
